title: CSIR NCL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: CSIR National Chemical Laboratory (CSIR NCL) has published the official notification for the recruitment 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Associate I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.Pharm, B.E/ B.Tech, M.V.Sc, and Post Graduation can use this chance and apply for the CSIR NCL Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candi...
